string-array.name: gad7_questions
string-array.item: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
Not being able to stop or control worrying
Worrying too much about different things
Trouble relaxing
Being so restless that it\'s hard to sit still
Becoming easily annoyed or irritable
Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen

string-array.name: gad7_options
string-array.item: Not at all
Several days
More than half the days
Nearly every day

string-array.name: hads_anxiety_questions
string-array.item: I feel tense or \'wound up\'
I get a sort of frightened feeling as if something awful is about to happen
Worrying thoughts go through my mind
I can sit at ease and feel relaxed
I get a sort of frightened feeling like \'butterflies\' in the stomach
I feel restless as if I have to be on the move
I get sudden feelings of panic

string-array.name: hads_depression_questions
string-array.item: I still enjoy the things I used to enjoy
I can laugh and see the funny side of things
I feel cheerful
I feel as if I am slowed down
I have lost interest in my appearance
I look forward with enjoyment to things
I can enjoy a good book or radio or TV program
